{{Quote|The massacre at High Rock Canyon, losing half your forces to the virus we engineered. ''Your father''.|Thorne Kraym|<ref name="Empire 32">[[Empire 32|''Empire'' 32]]</ref>}}
The '''massacre at High Rock Canyon''' was a skirmish between the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] and the [[Jabiimi Loyalists]] on the [[High Rock Canyon]]. The Loyalists faced a huge defeat in the battle.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 32|''Empire'' 32]] {{1stm}}
*[[Empire 33|''Empire'' 33]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
